title: sticherus tomentosus
intro: Sticherus tomentosus, also known as the hairy gristle fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Gleicheniaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of Sticherus tomentosus are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
